title: Bridge Essay: From brain-body function to conscious interactions.
concept: 4E cognition — embodied, enactive, extended, embedded mind.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, enactive, extended, embedded mind.

**From brain-body function to conscious interactions.** - Neurosci Biobehav Rev (2022). DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2022.104833. PMID: 36037978. In this review, we discuss empirical results inspiring the introduction of a formal mathematical multilayer model for the biological neuroscience of conscious experience. First, we motivate the discussion through evidence regarding the dynamic brain. Second, we review different brain-body couplings associated with conscious experience and its potential role in driving brain dynamics.
